title: Add health check endpoint to data pipeline
body: Guide for adding a /healthz endpoint to the studio inventory data pipeline so monitoring can confirm the nightly sync from the gallery sales feed is running. Covers the readiness check, expected 200 response payload, and the alert threshold when the last successful sync is older than 24 hours.

title: Document new deployment runbook
body: Reference runbook for deploying the studio website and online shop. Lists the staging-then-production promotion steps, the environment variables required for the gallery payment integration, rollback procedure, and the post-deploy smoke checks for the catalog search index.

title: Update auth library to patch CVE
body: Guide for upgrading the authentication library used by the studio admin portal to address a published CVE. Walks through pinning the patched version, regenerating session secrets, verifying gallery-staff logins still work, and confirming no breaking changes to the password reset flow.

title: Fix layout shift on landing hero
body: Tutorial showing how to eliminate cumulative layout shift on the studio site landing hero, where the featured ceramic piece image was loading without reserved dimensions. Walkthroughnstrates setting explicit width and height, preloading the hero asset, and measuring the CLS improvement in the browser performance panel.

title: Document new deployment runbook
body: Reference appendix to the deployment runbook covering the scheduled-job side of releases: cron entries for the nightly catalog reindex, the weekly gallery sales export, and the database backup verification. Documents each job's owner, expected duration, and where to find its logs.

title: Document new deployment runbook
body: Step-by-step guide version of the deployment runbook aimed at the gallery assistant doing a release for the first time. Explains how to trigger the build, wait for the green check, promote to production, and what to look at on the live shop to confirm the deploy succeeded.

title: Investigate flaky CI runs on the web suite
body: Tutorial walking through how to reproduce and diagnose flaky CI runs on the studio site web test suite. Covers re-running with verbose output, isolating the timing-dependent search index tests, adding explicit waits, and quarantining a test while the root cause is fixed.

title: Investigate flaky CI runs on the web suite
body: Guide summarizing the team's standing approach to flaky web-suite CI failures: how to read the retry dashboard, when to open a flaky-test ticket, the policy for skipping versus fixing, and the monthly review of the most frequently retried tests.
